description: User voice preferences learned from tweet drafting and editing. Read before drafting, append after posting.

entries.observation: Prefers direct, factual tone. No fluff, no hype.
Avoids em dashes and dashes as punctuation. Use commas, periods, or restructure instead.
Likes data-driven posts with visual elements (bar charts, lists, structured numbers).
Prefers threads over single tweets for complex topics.
Wants sources credited at the end of a tweet or thread.
Tone: informative, not preachy or political.
